section.heading: Disbursement of environmental funds

content.p: Funds in an Environmental Fund shall be disbursed only pursuant to a framework agreement entered into pursuant to section 1738f of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (July 10, 1954, ch. 469, title VI, § 609, as added Pub. L. 101–624, title XV, § 1512, Nov. 28, 1990, 104 Stat. 3661.)
